answer: Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title were overstated in the escrow disbursement reconciliation variance because settlement_disbursement_recon_v3 joined party_identity_bridge on normalized_tax_id, which duplicated roles within the same closing. The fix is to use closing_party_role_id and backfill finance.disbursement_recon_daily.

facts.affected_segment: florida purchase closings for fnf national title
facts.remediation: switch the transform to closing_party_role_id, quarantine normalized_tax_id joins, and backfill florida purchase closings
